title: stimomphis linearis
intro: Stimomphis linearis, also known as the Chinese dragon's blood tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, with its name derived from the red sap it secretes when injured. The sap of Stimomphis linearis has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Stimomphis linearis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote tissue repair, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Stimomphis linearis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tinctures, ointments, and salves, which can be applied topically or consumed orally, depending on the intended use.
